transforms: Extract Syria rows from the official production and pre-release CSV parts.
Compare official production and pre-release Syria row sets against each other.
Compare the official row set against the DataHub UN/LOCODE mirror used for canonical records.
Use official UN/LOCODE only as a currentness review source until redistribution and derivative compilation terms are cleared.
reviewNotes: Reviewed the official production UN/LOCODE 2025-1 package and the pre-release package listed as last updated 2026-06-16. Both packages contain the same 19 Syria location codes plus the country header row. No new Syria UN/LOCODE rows were found beyond the DataHub mirror already reviewed. No canonical location records were added or changed by this review.
